title: Nightly Cleanup Batch Job
description: ARCHETYPE: batch_job. Shape: backend-only (no pages, no auth), driven by a CRON schedule block (every day at 2am), NO external API calls, NO transforms — just pure cleanup. DO NOT call any external URL (that would make this a data_sync or etl). DO NOT build a dashboard. DO NOT build multiple endpoints — only POST /api/logs (for test setup) and GET /api/logs (for verification). The CORE of this task is the scheduled job: `every day at '02:00 AM':` then delete Logs older than 30 days. The endpoints exist only so tests can create rows then check them.
skeleton:
build for javascript backend

create a Logs table:
  message, required
  level, default 'info'
  created_at_date, auto

# Your scheduled job + /api/logs endpoint here
# Use: every day at '02:00 AM': ... delete old Logs ...
